## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PackageOpen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PackageOpen { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
box, container, storage, unpack, unarchive, unzip, opened, delivered

## Categories
files, development
